titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 719

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=950 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 12:40:59.633743+00 | translation moa=951 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 12:40:59.619594+00

p.cl:
Iohannes Magister Monialium de sancti Boydano . et Priorissa et Conuentus eiusdem loci . Omnibus hoc scriptum videntibus
vel audientibus salutem in domino .

Nouerit vniuersitas vestra quod nos tenemur reddere Priori et Conuentui de Coldingham
annuatim ad festum sancti Iohannis Baptiste duodecim denarii vel vnam libram piperis pro decima feni cuiusdam prati de Bylye
quod scilicet pratum dicta priorissa et dicte Moniales de sancto Boydano possident ex donacione Ade filii Ylif de Aldengra
we . et Roberti lauerd de eadem villa .
et in huius rei testimonium presenti scripto sigillum capituli nostri apposuimus .
John, master of the nuns of St Bothan's, and the prioress and convent of the same place, to all who view or hear this writing, greeting in the Lord.

Let all of you know that we are required to render to the prior and convent of Coldingham annually at the feast of Saint John the Baptist twelve pence or one pound of pepper in return for the teind of the hay crop from a certain meadow at Billie, that is, the meadow which the said prioress and nuns of St Bothan's possess from the donation of Adam son of Ylif, of Auchencrow, and of Robert Laverd, of the same toun.
In testimony of this matter we have applied the seal of our chapter to the present writing.
